name: io.github.soufianetahiri/mception
description: Audits other MCP servers for security risks. Static analysis across Python / TypeScript / JavaScript / Go / Rust / Ruby plus supply-chain, transport, and cross-config checks. Returns safe / caution / unsafe / inconclusive verdicts.

environmentVariables.name: MCEPTION_DATA_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Where audit reports and rug-pull baselines live. Defaults to ~/.mception.

environmentVariables.name: MCEPTION_OFFLINE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to block all outbound HTTP requests (OSV, registry signals, phantom-repo probes).

environmentVariables.name: MCEPTION_INTROSPECT_TIMEOUT
environmentVariables.description: Per-target timeout in seconds for the fetcher + engine pipeline.

environmentVariables.name: MCEPTION_ENABLE_LLM_JUDGE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 to enable advisory LLM-assisted classification of ambiguous descriptions via MCP sampling. No API key needed.
